title: Teleport Mod - MTM
description: This mod makes it easier and more accurate for players to teleport, through their Minecraft World.
body:
![Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aefbff7dcb7c92e8a0f7e13c78032e042439fe8.png)

# Teleport Mod - MTM

**No more endless walking!** This mod adds a fair and intuitive teleportation system that allows you to travel precisely to any coordinate – as long as you have enough energy.

## Main Features

* **GUI-based:** No complicated typing in chat. Use item -> enter coordinates -> teleport.
* **Energy System:** Fair balancing! You need **Energy Orbs** as fuel.
* **Tier System:** Upgrade your crystals for better efficiency.
* **Loot Generation:** Find **Tier 3 Crystals** directly in **End City** chests!
* **Informative Tooltips:** Hover over the teleporter to see exactly what range (Tier) it has.


## How it works

### 1. The Teleporter & NBT
Craft the teleporter (check the image gallery).
* **Technical Detail:** The efficiency (blocks per orb) is stored directly in the item's **NBT data**. This allows for flexible values!
* **Energy Orbs:** Mined as ore in the Nether (requires Iron Pickaxe or better).

### 2. Efficiency (Tiers)
The better the crystal, the fewer Energy Orbs you consume for the same distance.

| Tier | Efficiency | Source |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Tier 1** | **30** Blocks/Orb | Crafting |
| **Tier 2** | **60** Blocks/Orb | Crafting, Smithing Table or End City Chests |
| **Tier 3** | **120** Blocks/Orb | Crafting or Smithing Table |
| **Tier 4** | **120** Blocks/Orb + Dimensional travel | Crafting or Smithing Table |

### 3. Warning: Safety
Be careful which coordinates you enter! There is no safety check against walls.
* If you teleport into solid blocks, you will suffocate.
* There is a **custom death message** for this, so everyone knows what happened!


## Installation & Requirements

This mod is for **Fabric** (Minecraft 1.21).

* **Required:** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
